Question: Match the organism or term with its habitat or characteristic
Answer:
1) Fish - a) Water
2) Frog - b) Water and land
3) Bird - c) Air (flies) and land (nests)
4) Snake - d) Land, burrows or trees
5) Earthworm - e) Soil
6) Deer - f) Forests or grasslands
7) Cactus - g) Desert
8) Penguin - h) Cold regions, near water
9) Polar bear - i) Arctic region
10) Coral - j) Marine environment, reefs
11) Oak tree - k) Forests
12) Moss - l) Moist shady areas
13) Algae - m) Water bodies
14) Habitat - n) Place where an organism lives
15) Ecosystem - o) Community of organisms with surroundings
